title: Bambino Paperwrap Design Pink Photo Frame 4" x 4" Baby Girl
description: A stylish photo frame with little star design for a Baby Girl from Bambino. This beautiful pink frame is the perfect way to cherish the memory of a new little arrival. The frame features an attractive gold and silver foil falling star design and 'Gorgeous Baby Girl' titling. There is a 4' x 4' aperture for displaying your most treasured picture.This sentimental and touching keepsake frame is complemented with attractive packaging to complete the gift. Product Details Brand : Bambino Height (cm) : 21 Width (cm) : 15 Depth (cm) : 1.5 Weight (kg) : 0.26 Colour : Pink Material : Paper/ Card - Foiled Type : Photo Frames
